title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由与灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户轻松运行 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等多种 AI 模型。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，支持多种功能如图像生成、图像编辑、模型管理、扩展插件等，是 Stable Diffusion 社区最流行的 Web UI 之一。
highlights: Stable Diffusion web UI
基于 Gradio 库
支持多种功能如图像生成、图像编辑、模型管理、扩展插件

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Hugging Face Transformers 是一个先进的机器学习模型框架，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的推理与训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: I let AI build a tool to help me figure out what was waking me up at night
content: Article URL: https://martin.sh/i-let-ai-build-a-tool-to-help-me-figure-out-what-was-waking-me-up-at-night/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48100662 Points: 264 # Comments: 277
summary: 作者利用AI构建了一个工具，用于分析夜间醒来的原因，通过追踪和识别模式来改善睡眠质量。
highlights: I let AI build a tool to help me figure out what was waking me up at night
通过AI工具追踪夜间醒来模式
利用数据分析识别睡眠干扰因素

title: If AI writes your code, why use Python?
content: Article URL: https://medium.com/@NMitchem/if-ai-writes-your-code-why-use-python-bf8c4ba1a055 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48100433 Points: 879 # Comments: 933
summary: 文章探讨了在AI能够编写代码的背景下，Python语言仍然具有不可替代的价值，包括其简洁性、生态系统和社区支持。
highlights: If AI writes your code, why use Python?
Python's simplicity and readability remain key advantages.
The extensive ecosystem and community support make Python indispensable.

title: The Crystallization of Transformer Architectures (2017-2025)
summary: 文章回顾了2017年至2025年间Transformer架构的演变与固化过程，分析了关键设计选择如何逐步标准化，并探讨了未来可能的发展方向。
highlights: Transformer架构从2017年提出到2025年经历了显著的标准化过程。
关键设计如多头注意力、层归一化和残差连接成为主流。
文章预测了未来Transformer可能面临的挑战与改进方向。

title: Training an LLM in Swift, Part 1: Taking matrix multiplication from Gflop/s to Tflop/s
summary: 本文介绍了在Swift中训练大型语言模型（LLM）的第一部分，重点是如何将矩阵乘法的性能从Gflop/s提升到Tflop/s级别，通过优化实现高效计算。
highlights: Training an LLM in Swift, Part 1: Taking matrix multiplication from Gflop/s to Tflop/s
Comments

title: How finance teams use Codex
content: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.
summary: 本文介绍了财务团队如何利用Codex构建MBR、报告包、差异桥接、模型检查和规划场景，基于实际工作输入。
highlights: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.

title: How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
content: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments.
summary: NVIDIA工程师和研究人员使用Codex与GPT-5.5来交付生产系统，并将研究想法转化为可运行的实验。
highlights: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems
turn research ideas into runnable experiments

title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
summary: 本文介绍了在AWS上训练和部署基础模型（Foundation Models）的核心构建块，包括计算、存储、网络和框架优化，并提供了最佳实践和架构建议。
highlights: AWS provides scalable infrastructure for foundation model training and inference.
Key building blocks include GPU instances, high-performance storage, and optimized networking.
Best practices involve using SageMaker, EFA, and FSx for Lustre to accelerate workloads.

title: EMO: Pretraining mixture of experts for emergent modularity
summary: EMO是一种基于混合专家模型（MoE）的预训练方法，旨在通过路由机制实现模块化，提升模型在多种任务上的表现和效率。
highlights: EMO通过预训练混合专家模型实现 emergent modularity
该方法在多个基准测试中展示了性能提升和计算效率
路由机制允许模型动态选择专家，增强任务适应性
